title: Blackbeard Ambushes Law
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Dorry, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Luffy as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHATA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You okay, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmm? I thought I got swallowed, but...?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Woah! is that a giant parfait?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's cookies and fruits too!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: look at all that cream!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thanks for the meeeeeal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hold it, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why would they leave food lying around?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This has to be a trap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We went right through it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we see it but not touch it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chomf Chomf Chomf

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so cruel to make us hungry like that....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh crap... did we die earlier and not notice?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no way we're ghosts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen one before, but this Parfait must be a hologram.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is that?! this ticks me off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a 3D image made of light. You see 'em in comics and science fiction stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's 💙�� just an image?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OH! The space monster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's why I went right through it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The giant robot must be one too. No one can make something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, what's this? All these buttons have pictures of food on them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give up already, everything on this island's a sham.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That reminds me, weren't the seas around the island freezing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you'd expect this place to have a similar climate, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Actually, this is a winter island, but the environment is set to tropical mode in here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With my ISLAND AIRCON invention, you can specify and regulate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the temperature of an area right down to the soil!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This one's as big as Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're a holo-Holo thing too, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ungh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GWAH!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
